summary: A small rectangular bunker-style structure with a stepped brick roof, concrete foundation platform, and a single row of four dark-framed windows. The building sits in an excavated pit with white concrete borders and is surrounded by brown dirt and green grass.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof

elements: stepped brick roof with multiple tiers
rebuild_hints: Create a rectangular pit foundation approximately 12×10 blocks
Build white concrete border around the pit perimeter
Construct main walls from sandstone with stonebrick corner pillars
Install four evenly-spaced dark-framed windows on front face
Build stepped pyramid roof using brick blocks in 3-4 ascending tiers
Add concrete trim between wall and roof sections
Ensure bilateral symmetry on all axes
Roof steps inward progressively toward center peak
uncertainties: Precise block count for roof tiers uncertain from angles shown
Window frame material could be dark oak or spruce wood
Depth dimension estimated from perspective; may vary by 1-2 blocks
Whether structure has interior floor or is open-topped uncertain
